title: IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
short_info: IIT Kanpur is recruiting 1 Project Engineer post in Robotics under the Department of Electrical Engineering on contractual basis.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech degree in Electrical Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Mechatronics and allied areas. OR B.Tech degree in Electrical Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Mechatronics and allied areas with at least 3 years relevant experience.
qualification.experience: Strong hands-on experience in development and testing of robots, hardware design, fabrication, integration, troubleshooting, control systems, sensors, actuators, MATLAB, etc.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview / further selection process as decided by the institute. The position is purely contractual in nature.
how_to_apply: Candidates must fill the online application form on or before **01 June 2026** using the link given below. Please fill the form carefully.
Application Link: Click Here to Apply
For any technical issues while accessing the form, contact: [email protected]
important_instructions: The position is purely contractual and temporary in nature. Selected candidate will work primarily on mathematical modeling, design, simulation, and hardware development of robotic systems. No claim for regular appointment or absorption in IIT Kanpur. Candidates must have strong knowledge of MATLAB and hands-on robotics experience.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name in IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post is Project Engineer in Robotics under the Department of Electrical Engineering

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for IIT Kanpur Project Engineer 2026? A: There is 01 (One) vacancy available.
faq.answer: There is 01 (One) vacancy available.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Engineer at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary is Rs. 33,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for IIT Kanpur Project Engineer?
faq.answer: M.Tech in Electrical/Mechanical/Mechatronics or B.Tech with minimum 3 years relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 01 June 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply through the online Google Form only. No other mode is accepted.

faq.question: Q7. Is the IIT Kanpur Project Engineer position permanent?
faq.answer: No. The position is purely contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q8. What are the key job responsibilities for this role?
faq.answer: Mathematical modeling, control algorithm development, simulation, stability analysis, and robotic hardware platform development & testing.

faq.question: Q9. Who is the Principal Investigator for this project?
faq.answer: Dr. Abhilash Patel, Department of Electrical Engineering, IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q10. What experience is desirable for the Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: Hands-on experience in robot development, hardware design, control systems, sensors, actuators, MATLAB, and troubleshooting.
